summary: Feature Testing Complete - All new features working correctly: 1) Admin Wartungsmodus (Maintenance Mode) Tab visible and fully functional, 2) Maintenance API endpoints working (enable/disable toggle), 3) Freunde werben (Referral) Link visible in navbar for logged-in users and navigates to /referral page, 4) Admin Influencer Tab continues to work correctly

maintenance_tab_visibility.details: Wartung tab visible in Admin Panel sidebar with Wrench icon

maintenance_toggle_functionality.details: Can activate and deactivate maintenance mode. Status changes from 'System Online' to 'Wartungsmodus AKTIV' with proper details (Aktiviert von, Aktiviert am, Geschätztes Ende)

maintenance_api_admin_status.details: GET /api/maintenance/admin/status requires auth and returns detailed status

maintenance_api_toggle.details: POST /api/maintenance/toggle enables/disables maintenance mode with message and estimated_minutes

referral_link_visibility.details: 'Freunde werben' link visible in navbar for logged-in users (pink text with Gift icon)

referral_link_navigation.details: Clicking 'Freunde werben' navigates to /referral page showing referral code, stats, and leaderboard

influencer_tab.details: Admin Influencer tab works correctly - shows list of influencers with stats, 'Neuer Influencer' button available

context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested and working: 1) Maintenance Mode - Admin can toggle via /admin Wartung tab, API at /api/maintenance/status (public) and /api/maintenance/toggle (admin). 2) Freunde werben link visible in navbar for logged-in users, navigates to /referral page. 3) Influencer tab continues to work. All features are fully functional with no issues found.
